compliance_posture: strict-letter-for-letter ANNEX-133 §2-§12, no invented folders, canonical inconsistencies preserved and flagged in README

department_codes_canonical.note: DEP-PRO is canonical literal from §8 line 383 path column; §12 token table uses D-PROD as parent DeptCode. Inconsistency preserved per strict-compliance posture.

naming_tokens_canonical.role_vs_user_distinction: RoleCode in FOLDER names (06-Working-Transitory ROLE-{RoleCode}/); UserID in FILE names (e.g. NCR-2026-043-NVA.pdf). Never mix.

known_canonical_inconsistencies.description: Path column literal uses DEP-PRO (3-letter); §2 table cell and §12 token table list parent DeptCode as D-PROD (4-letter).
known_canonical_inconsistencies.blueprint_decision: Use DEP-PRO per §8 path column literal
known_canonical_inconsistencies.recommended_source_doc_fix: Decide canonical (likely DEP-PROD to match D-PROD parent) and update §8 line 383

known_canonical_inconsistencies.description: Folder names 01-Đào tạo-kế hoạch and 02-Điểm danh-and-Class-Records contain Vietnamese diacritics + spaces.
known_canonical_inconsistencies.blueprint_decision: Keep literal per strict compliance — flag canonical inconsistency in README
known_canonical_inconsistencies.recommended_source_doc_fix: Rename to 01-Training-Plan and 02-Attendance-and-Class-Records to align with §12 {DescriptionSlug} rule and SharePoint/OneDrive sync safety

known_canonical_inconsistencies.description: §11 path uses {Rev}; §5 path uses {Revision}; §12 lists only {Revision}.
known_canonical_inconsistencies.blueprint_decision: Use literal canonical per each path

known_canonical_inconsistencies.description: {ID-Name} placeholder used for contractors but not in §12 token table.
known_canonical_inconsistencies.recommended_source_doc_fix: Add {ID-Name} (or replace with {ContractorID}-{FullName}) to §12 token table

known_canonical_inconsistencies.description: Customer-Received, Tooling-Fixture-Gage, HR-Operations are named as libraries but no §3-§11 spec defines their internal sub-structure.
known_canonical_inconsistencies.blueprint_decision: Library root only with .gitkeep — no sub-folders invented
known_canonical_inconsistencies.recommended_source_doc_fix: Author §X sections defining sub-structure or document that these are admin-managed namespaces

Author drift-check script comparing live tenant vs this blueprint
Wait for ANNEX-134 permission/automation spec before adding security group bindings
